mapper.select: select `id`, `task_id`, `task_name`, `execute_status`, `content`, `execute_time` from `sys_scheduled_log` order by `name` desc, `execute_time` desc, id

select `id`, `task_id`, `task_name`, `execute_status`, `content`, `execute_time` from `sys_scheduled_log` where `task_id` = #{taskId} and execute_status = 'fail' order by `execute_time` desc, `id` desc limit 1

select `id`, `task_id`, `task_name`, `execute_status`, `content`, `execute_time` from `sys_scheduled_log` where `task_id` = #{taskId} and `execute_time` > #{executeTime} and `execute_status` = 'fail' order by `execute_time` asc, `id` asc limit 1

select `id`, `task_id`, `task_name`, `execute_status`, `content`, `execute_time` from `sys_scheduled_log` where `task_id` = #{taskId} and `execute_time` < #{executeTime} and `execute_status` = 'fail' order by `execute_time` desc, `id` desc limit 1
